ChangeInstancePassword.action: The action to perform on the instance, current valid value: changePass
ChangeInstancePassword.adminPass: The administrator password to set for the instance, 8-32 characters, must contain at least three of the following: uppercase letters, lowercase letters, digits, and special characters; allowed special characters are limited to `()`~!@#$%^&*-_+=|{}[]:;'<>,.?/`; the password must be encrypted before transmission, see [Password Encryption Transmission Specification](BCC/API参考/通用说明.md#密码加密传输规范)
